an5.137:1.1: “Monks, these five get little sleep at night, and are mostly awake.
an5.137:1.3: A woman intent on a man gets little sleep at night, and is mostly awake.
an5.137:1.4: A man intent on a woman gets little sleep at night, and is mostly awake.
an5.137:1.5: A thief intent on theft gets little sleep at night, and is mostly awake.
an5.137:1.6: A king fettered by royal duties gets little sleep at night, and is mostly awake.
an5.137:1.7: A monk intent on becoming unfettered gets little sleep at night, and is mostly awake.
an5.137:1.8: “These five, monks, get little sleep at night, and are mostly awake.”
